topic: 5 npm packages that feel like cheat codes
caption: 5 npm packages that feel like cheat codes, send emails, resize images, fake an entire API, read text from images, and control a browser, all in a few lines. Most devs have never touched them. Save this and go star your favorite.

slides.headline: 5 npm packages you had no idea existed
Nodemailer
slides.body: Send real emails from your app in a few lines, attachments, HTML, the works.

slides.headline: sharp
slides.body: Resize, crop, convert, and optimize images at ludicrous speed. Every app needs it.

slides.headline: json-server
slides.body: A full fake REST API in 30 seconds, zero backend code. Prototype your frontend first.

slides.headline: Tesseract.js
slides.body: OCR in pure JavaScript, pull the text out of any image, right in the browser.

slides.headline: Puppeteer
slides.body: Drive a real Chrome browser from code, screenshots, PDFs, scraping, automation.

slides.headline: Save this before you lose it
slides.body: Which one are you installing first?
